symptom: breathing difficulty with bowel sounds heard in the chest
hook: loops of bowel had climbed up through a hole in the diaphragm into the chest
whatYouSee: Bowel loops sit up inside the chest cavity through a defect in the back of the diaphragm and push the heart to the other side.
whyItMatters: This congenital diaphragmatic defect lets abdominal organs into the chest where they compress the developing lung and impair breathing especially in newborns.
treatment: Treatment is surgical repair of the diaphragmatic defect after stabilisation of breathing.
takeaway: Bowel loops in the chest through a back-of-diaphragm hole is a Bochdalek hernia.

condition.symptom: breathing difficulty with bowel sounds heard in the chest
condition.hook: loops of bowel had climbed up through a hole in the diaphragm into the chest
condition.keyFindings: gas-filled bowel loops within the thorax, usually on the left, through a posterolateral diaphragmatic defect, with shift of the mediastinum away from the herniated side
condition.whatYouSee: Bowel loops sit up inside the chest cavity through a defect in the back of the diaphragm and push the heart to the other side.
condition.whyItMatters: This congenital diaphragmatic defect lets abdominal organs into the chest where they compress the developing lung and impair breathing especially in newborns.
condition.treatment: Treatment is surgical repair of the diaphragmatic defect after stabilisation of breathing.
condition.takeaway: Bowel loops in the chest through a back-of-diaphragm hole is a Bochdalek hernia.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with breathing difficulty with bowel sounds heard in the chest.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And loops of bowel had climbed up through a hole in the diaphragm into the chest.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Bochdalek hernia

👀 What you see:
Bowel loops sit up inside the chest cavity through a defect in the back of the diaphragm and push the heart to the other side.

🦴 Why it matters:
This congenital diaphragmatic defect lets abdominal organs into the chest where they compress the developing lung and impair breathing especially in newborns.

📝 Takeaway:
Bowel loops in the chest through a back-of-diaphragm hole is a Bochdalek hernia.
